title: Outsoles having traction inserts
abstract: An article of footwear may include an outsole having an opening extending from a top face of the outsole to a ground-contacting face of the outsole, and a traction member disposed within the opening in the outsole. The traction member has a protruding portion and flange portion extending from an upper end of the protruding portion. The flange portion is secured to the top face of the outsole.
claims: 1. An article of footwear comprising: an outsole having a plurality of openings, wherein each of the openings extends from a top face of the outsole to a ground-contacting face of the outsole, wherein each of the openings comprises a respective recess in the top face of the outsole in communication with a respective hole in the ground-contacting face, the recess having a dimension larger than the hole; and a respective traction member disposed within each opening in the outsole, each traction member comprising a protruding portion and a flange portion extending from an upper end of the protruding portion and secured to a top face of the respective recess, wherein the flange is seated in the respective recess and a shape of the flange conforms to a shape of the respective recess, such that a top face of the flange is flush with the top face of the outsole.
